hero.title: Talk with us about the property.
hero.summary: Share the asset type, location, and the main management issues. We will review it and follow up.

brief.title: Reach Benjamin or Jessica directly.
brief.text: Benjamin handles proposals and owner conversations. Jessica supports bilingual communication and relationship coordination.
points: Jessica Huang for bilingual communication support

channelsHeading.title: Call or email the team.
channelsHeading.text: For proposals, management questions, or bilingual communication, contact us directly.

channels.title: Benjamin LaGrone
channels.text: For owner conversations, service proposals, and property management discussions.

channels.title: Jessica Huang
channels.text: For bilingual communication and relationship support during active discussions.

channels.title: Direct lines
channels.text: Call if you want to explain the building, the issue, or the current management gap directly.

heading.title: Request management support.
heading.text: Outline the building, the location, and the problems you want handled. We will review it and respond.

form.helper: Submitting prepares an email draft with the information above.

faqHeading.title: What owners usually ask first
faqHeading.text: If your situation is specific, the fastest answer is still a direct conversation.

faq.question: What property types do you support?
faq.answer: LeCrown focuses on warehouse, office, and corporate properties that need stronger communication, cleaner coordination, and dependable day-to-day oversight.

faq.question: Can you work with Mandarin-speaking owners or tenants?
faq.answer: Yes. LeCrown offers bilingual communication in English and Mandarin for owners, tenants, and partners who need it.

faq.question: What should I include in the first message?
faq.answer: Include the property type, the location, the main operating issues, and what kind of support you are looking for.
